GeneralBoatDescription:
The 2022 Back Cove 372 is a popular single-engine Downeast-style cruiser known for its classic aesthetics, comfortable ride, and practical features. It's an updated version of the highly successful Back Cove 37, incorporating feedback from owners and leveraging new technology.  The 372 is designed for couples or families seeking a comfortable, well-built cruiser for coastal adventures, blending traditional Downeast appeal with modern amenities and improved technology.

This is a dealer owned boat, all ready for your family's next coastal adventure.
AdditionalDetailDescription:
Key Features and Highlights

  • Design and Construction:

    • Maintains the elegant and timeless Downeast lines of its predecessor.

    • Hull is modified-V forward with camber from bow to transom for a soft ride.

    • Built with durable construction, including PVC foam-cored hull bottom and resin-infused foam-core stringer system.

    • Prop resides in a tunnel, partially protected by a keel, skeg, and rudder, resulting in a reasonable 3-foot-7-inch draft.

  • Performance:

    • Powered by a single Volvo Penta D8 diesel engine 600 HP @ 3000 RPM w/ Volvo 7" display

    • Offers a smooth and quiet ride, capable of a wide-open speed around 33 mph and a fast cruise of 26.5 mph.

    • Good fuel efficiency, with a reported range of 340 miles at cruising speed.

    • Equipped with a standard Side-Power bow thruster (SE100) and a stern thruster for easy handling, especially for couples.

  • Interior and Accommodations:

    • Layout: Two cabins, a salon table that converts to an additional berth, a head with a separate shower, and a fully equipped mid-level galley.

    • Master Stateroom: Cherry-paneled with an island queen berth.

    • Guest Stateroom: Offers a double berth, also suitable for additional storage.

    • Head: Reconfigured with an expanded medicine cabinet, sizeable over-sink mirror, and redesigned shower stall.

    • Galley: Features an induction cooktop, AC/DC stainless steel drawer-type fridge/freezer, microwave, and ample storage.

    • Salon: Comfortable seating for seven, with a flip-down LCD TV and XM-friendly stereo system.

    • Visibility: Large tri-pane windshield with glare-reducing black mullions, fixed-glazed pilothouse windows (replacing sliding windows for enhanced sightlines), and a center-opening windshield.

  • Updates and New Features (compared to the original Back Cove 37):

    • Electrical System: Upgraded to a more efficient 24V DC system, reducing copper weight and increasing run time for thrusters.

    • Helm: Redesigned with a black windshield liner and upholstered helm pod to reduce glare, and increased space for navigation electronics.

    • Cockpit: New aft-facing cockpit seat to starboard with a folding armrest and drink holder, and a new salon door to port with a bi-fold window.

    • Bow Thruster: Upgraded to a SidePower SE100 for greater control.

GeneralBoatDescription:
The Back Cove 37 continues the practical features that have identified the Back Cove range of down east style motor yachts: Usability, low maintenance and fuel efficiency.

In the master stateroom there is an island berth for ease of egress, and for stowage of owner’s gear, there are many lockers and drawers provided. To starboard aft of the master is a full guest cabin with a pullman berth and ample storage capacity. Opposite and to port is a large head unit with separate stall shower.

Between the lower and salon sole levels, the mid-galley is fully equipped with a refrigerator, freezer, microwave oven and deep stainless steel sink as well as many drawers and lockers for galley storage. Large windows overhead provide the galley with ample visibility and light.

In the salon twin Stidd helm seats are provided for the helmsman and crew. Aft of the helm is an L-shaped settee and to port a two person love seat. An elegant inlaid table offers a comfortable space for dining with crew and guests. Large windows offer plenty of light and air while overhead a large sliding pilot hatch allows air to flow through the salon. At the aft end of the main salon large swing-bi-fold doors completely open up the salon to the cockpit. At the transom, fixed seating will provide the comfort you desire for socializing with guests.

GeneralBoatDescription:
As spirited as she is beautiful, this 2006 Back Cove 26 is known for its classic "Downeast" style design with a cherry interior, V-berth, dinette, and typically featuring a single Yanmar diesel engine; considered a reliable and comfortable cruiser for coastal cruising and fishing excursions. She is a classic Downeast-style cruiser known for its efficient, single diesel engine performance and high-quality build.  The style and grace of the Maine lobster boat has been admired by boating enthusiasts the world over; no builder blends the classical looks with modern construction better than Back Cove Yachts.   

Orion is ready to launch for your next adventure on the water.  The hull and the bottom was repainted in April of 2024 and the canvas top was replaced in 2023.  Service Records available.

GeneralBoatDescription: The Nordic Tug 32 is a fuel efficient cruising vessel featuring classic Nordic Tug styling. She is built in the USA and is equipped with a standard 280 Volvo diesel engine. As with all Nordic Tugs, the 32 has a semi-displacement hull built with hand-laid heavily reinforced fiberglass with full keel and hard chine, giving her exceptional stability and handling qualities. Convenient port and starboard pilot house doors adds to the ease of captain's operation especially when navigating locks and docking. This very popular cruising vessel features a roomy salon/galley and separate pilothouse with a 360 degree view and 6'8" headroom. Forward is a spacious stateroom with head and large separate stall shower. The roomy salon has a large settee that converts into an oversized double berth. All Nordic Tugs hulls come standard with an incredible 10-year hull warranty.

She is in exceptional condition and will satisfy the most scrutinizing buyer / surveyor both mechanically and cosmetically. No known issues...No Disappointment's !

The Grand Banks 43 Europa is the successor to the popular Grand Banks 41 Europa, with the addition of the second head and added space in the salon and cockpit. One of the most popular features of the 43 EU is the large utility room with ample storage space and washer/dryer. Power is provided by twin Cummins 480s, offering speeds to 20 knots and good fuel economy for displacement-speed cruising. The precision joystick control provides great handling at the dock, and the sky-hook option will hold the vessel in place at bridge openings, or if single handling, gives the captain the option to put out lines and fenders without having to return to the helm.

The Grand Banks 43 Europa model is in high demand, and this is a great opportunity to purchase a Beautiful Grand Banks 43 that's ready to cruise!
AdditionalDetailDescription:
Walkthrough
 "HOP ABOARD" offers a very spacious aft deck with beautiful cockpit high gloss Teak table with polished stainless steel pedestal and Navy cover with two (2) folding Teak deck chairs. Access the flybridge via a staircase to port forward, at the center is the large engine room deck hatch with ladder. Her comfortable wide sidedecks with strong and high stainless steel rails offer easy transit from bow to stern.

Enter the salon from the sliding door on the aft deck. There is an L-settee aft to port with a Grand Banks yacht table with fold-up leaves. There is a straight settee to starboard with a hideaway TV on electric lift behind. The lower helm is forward with fixed helmseat and access below to the utility room with combo washer/dryer, freezer and a great amount of additional storage space. Across from the helm and to port is the fully equipped Galley with convection/microwave, 3-burner Ceran cooktop, two (2) fridge drawers, dedicated storage for silverware and overhead drop-down dish storage lockers, plentiful lockers and drawers for food storage and more.

Accommodations are down four (4) steps with the Master Stateroom forward and Guest Stateroom to port. The private Master Stateroom features an Island Queen berth with storage drawers beneath, hanging locker, additional storage drawers and night table. The en suite master head has a separate stall shower. The Guest Stateroom is large, open and airy and features twin large single berths, hanging locker and access to the head from the stateroom. This Guest/Day Head is also accessed from the companionway.

The flybridge offers a full Bimini top, full navigational station with two (2) Pompanette helm seats, L-settee and Teak table to starboard, additional seating to port with storage below, plentiful storage compartments, 800-lb. Steelhead davit and a Rigid 10 Sport tender w/ 30hp Evinrude E-Tec Motor. Storage is abundant throughout for all your cruising gear and so much more!

GeneralBoatDescription:
Carolina Girl is a prime example of a hardcore fishing yacht built to provide the utmost comfortability and performance. This Hatteras is as custom as they come and has been maintained by a family that understands what it takes that is required to fish on a competitive circuit. Carolina Girl has a open check book policy and some of the most recent upgrades include but not limited to a fresh 1000hr service, custom built mezzanine with refrigeration installed by Croswait Marine in addition to a transom fish box that is able to hold the days best catch, new after cooler cores, shafts, Garmin electronics package and much more! 

Carolina Girl is HANDS down the most upgraded/custom driest riding 54 Hatteras ever built! Only on her second owner and has custom lifting strakes installed by Croswait Custom Composite. Schedule a showing today to view this unique 54 Hatteras! 

Call now, this 54 Hatteras will not last! Call with trades & offers!
AdditionalDetailDescription:
Manufacturer Provided Description

The Hatteras 54 Convertible is designed specifically to deliver a smooth ride and excellent handling while operating at high speed. The convexity in the hull bottom helps make this hull immensely strong. The slight outward curvature (viewed from keel to chine) reduces impact accelerations and contributes to an incredibly smooth head-sea ride. The 54 is designed for serious sportfishing. The cockpit boasts a bait and tackle center with sink, cutting board and tackle drawers; a bait freezer; storage console with drawers, four rod holders; a removable, full-size in-deck fish box with macerator and an amply proportioned transom door. Inside, the salon/galley provides an L-shaped sofa and entertainment center. The entertainment center features a TV, AM/FM surround sound stereo receiver with DVD/CD player and VCR. The fully equipped galley offers natural wood cabinets, four-burner cooktop, garbage disposal and sub-zero style freezer and refrigerator drawer units. The microwave/convection oven is cleverly concealed by the cabinet door. This handsome galley is also practical ? the Amitco vinyl strip flooring resembles teak but is almost effortless to maintain. Galley storage is awesome with six exceptionally deep drawers. The chart flat area provides additional storage and is easily accessed via two cleverly designed deep drawers in the aft galley backsplash. Convenient, eye-level bulkhead access to this area offers even more storage opportunities within easy reach of the galley and dinette. The master stateroom features a queen berth with cedar-lined storage underneath, air conditioning disbursement through fluted wood valances for uniform comfort, and a concealed pocket access door for privacy. The entertainment center includes an LCD screen TV and AM/FM stereo receiver and CD player. The private master head includes a stall shower with seat, solid surface countertops, and easy-care Amtico vinyl strip flooring.

This vessel will be in Fort Lauderdale during the 2025 Fort Lauderdale International Boat Show. US FLAGGED.


This meticulously maintained Horizon PC65 is one of the most unique builds that Horizon Power Catamarans has ever produced. The 4 stateroom, 5 head, PC65 is equipped with an on-deck master/full beam stateroom and fully enclosed Skylounge/Pilothouse flybridge with internal stairs. The twin CAT C12-9 diesel motors, pushing 2000HP combined, make this PC one of the fastest in the fleet, cruising at 25 MPH and top speed of 30MPH. Very low hours on both engines.

Recent upgrades include:

  • Teak sanded and treated (August 2024) 
  • Full top to bottom ceramic coating (August 2024) 
  • New paint in all bilges and engine room (September 2024) 
  • Complete engine service (October 2024)

GeneralBoatDescription:
JUST REDUCED.....EXTREMELY CLEAN, WELL MAINTAINED CAPE HORN 27 XS

"Ms Stella" is a one owner, indoor rack stored Cape Horn 27 XS. Her 200 HP Yamaha's have been serviced every 100 hours by the same yard since new. Her gelcoat is in exceptional condition as you would expect from a boat that has been kept indoors. She has been lightly fished with most of her hours coming at trawling speeds. 

The Cape Horn 27 XS features a virtually unsinkable hull that is pressure filled with closed cell foam. Her sheerline is particularly distinctive and very attractive. The Cape Horn's cockpit is very accomodating.  She sports a 42 gallon livewell and a seven foot fishbox with 700 quart capacity for the angler, and seating for 8-10 people for a day of cruising. 

Notable features:

Forward seating with removable cushions and storage underneath plus forward floor storage

Anchor and line storage forward

Hardtop with additional rod holders, speakers, lighting, and storage

Helm seats with flip up bosters

Helm includes:  Garmin 7612 xsv, Garmin VHF 200, Fusion NRX, Lenco trim tab control, Richie compass, ACR EPIRB

Electronic shift contols

Triple batteries with crossover switches

Cockpit lighting

Fold away rear seat

Fresh and raw water washdowns

Live well/ fish box

Tackle drawers

Enclosed head in the console

Transom door and swim ladder

GeneralBoatDescription: Introducing the 2022 Caymas 28 HB Twin, a remarkable saltwater fishing boat designed for enthusiasts seeking adventure on the water. With an overall length of 27.58 feet, this vessel boasts a sleek and efficient modified vee hull made from durable composite material, ensuring stability and performance in various conditions. Powered by twin 300 hp Mercury Verado outboard engines, each with only 95 hours of use, this boat promises exhilarating speed and reliability. The outboard configuration enhances maneuverability, making it ideal for both fishing expeditions and leisurely cruises. The Caymas 28 HB Twin is equipped with essential features that enhance your boating experience. Its thoughtful design ensures comfort and functionality, making it a perfect choice for those who appreciate quality craftsmanship and performance. Experience the thrill of saltwater fishing with this exceptional boat that combines power, style, and versatility.

GeneralBoatDescription: The Donzi 38 ZF Cuddy has been designed to offer great looks, blistering performance, and unmatched versatility. Designed with thoughtful features throughout, this offshore speed machine performs equally well whether tournament fishing, cruising, entertaining, diving, or pursuing any other activity. The 38 ZF has been finished with upscale touches throughout. The sculpted, richly-padded drop-down bolster seats at the helm would be right at home on the sportiest high performance boat. The same goes for the wraparound cockpit coaming bolsters. There?s room to stand inside the roomy console with fiberglass inner liner, where a freshwater sink, shower, and head are housed. A curved, tempered-glass console windshield offers great looks as well as protection from the wind. With its proven ventilated hull design and triple Mercury 4-stroke Verado outboards, the 38 ZF offers great speed, nimble handling and a smooth, dry ride.

AdditionalDetailDescription:
Additional Information

The newest and largest Sedan, the 441, continues that tradition. The first thing I noticed about her was not her styling, but how easy it is to get around her. Getting aboard is unchallenging, whether from the side or via the three-foot-deep swim platform. So is entering the saloon from the seven-foot-long covered cockpit, through an easy-sliding door and over a low threshold. Headed up to the bridge? The trip's a snap, thanks to an enclosed, molded-FRP stairway. And the passage to the foredeck will be a low-drama event even for landlubbers and little ones, thanks to nine-inch-wide side decks, 28-inch-high rails that come all the way back to the cockpit, and grabrails that run the length of the house. As for the foredeck, it's nearly flat and covered in aggressive nonskid, and the bowrail rises to nearly chest height to protect you when anchoring.

Inside, you'll find a layout not only easy to move around in, but quite similar to that of the 411, the boat the 441 replaces. Only a single step divides the saloon from the galley-dinette deck, elevated to provide room for the midcabin beneath and to enhance visibility from the optional starboard-side lower helm. With 360-degree glass 

As for the galley, it's simple and efficient, with Karadon countertops, two big and deep stainless steel sinks, and a three-burner Origo stove. Both sinks and cooktop have Karadon covers to maximize workspace; the one for the latter is big, heavy, and hard to stow. It'd be easier to handle if divided into two 

has port and starboard windows that really open up the area. At the foot of the stairs is a head with doors to the hallway and midcabin, making it a good day head. There's no enclosed shower here, just a combination faucet-shower head. The larger forepeak en suite head is about a third bigger and has an enclosed shower.

GeneralBoatDescription:
This Sabre 58 astounds people when they get aboard as her lovely exterior styling belies the outstanding layout and space that is normally found on larger boats. However, the boat's actual size makes her ideal for a couple to enjoy cruising on their own yet offers plenty of space for adventuring with friends and family. Her Volvo IPS propulsion and Volvo Joystick not only make the boat extremely maneuverable in even the toughest docking situations, this propulsion system also provides outstanding performance with a renowned smooth and quiet ride. Her layout features three spacious cabins, each with their own ensuite heads and showers. One of the many highlights of this boat is the full-beam master cabin with its luxurious 76" X 80" island berth. And surprisingly, the VIP cabin forward is the size of a typical master cabin while the third guest cabin features twin berths that offer the option of sliding together electrically to make a queen-sized berth. 

The pilothouse is another highlight of this boat with the U-shaped galley located aft, providing outstanding access to both the cockpit and the large U-shaped settee forward.  The helm station is laid out cleanly and neatly making for easy operation of the outstanding navigation package. Not found on many other boats in this class is proper forward-facing seating for two couples with twin Stidd seats at the helm and a double companion seat to port. This seating provides great comfort and visibility in all directions. The large frameless direct-bonded pilothouse windows contribute to the outstanding sightlines for all aboard as well as bring in great natural light. 

Spirit In The Sky is fully equipped with a top-notch equipment list (as seen in the listing below) and is ideal for everything from afternoon trips to extended cruising wherever an owner chooses to venture. Be assured, the ride in a seaway is comfortable and dry.

The owner of Spirit In The Sky has provided only the best for the boat employing two of the top service providers for Sabre Yachts. The owner also is aboard almost every day to ensure all systems are functioning in tip-top shape. Simply put, this boat is ready to take her next owner on journeys near and far!

Manufacturer Provided Description

The 58 Salon Express design features large windows to flood the living areas in natural light, and a main door that opens fully from port to starboard, comfortably merging exterior and interior spaces. Located aft within the pilothouse, her fully equipped galley boasts a u-shaped counter to port with cooktop, sink, and ample under-counter storage, balanced to starboard with another stretch of linear counter and storage. From there, a single step accesses the salon, and the helm deck, creating a graceful and practical social space. Below deck, the 58 Salon Express houses three cabins each with ensuite head and shower, and including an expansive, full-beam master stateroom with a walk-around king berth, a generously proportioned head and shower unit, and abundant storage.

NMEA2000 NETWORK SYSTEM

Manufacturer Provided Description

This one-of-a-kind design delivers the accessibility of a walk around with the visibility of a step-up helm and forward cockpit seating, while all along doing it with the sexier lines and profile look of a cuddy. Moving the head out of the cabin created roomier overnight accommodations with a full galley, extra storage space and a convertible dinette-berth. Hidden under the console, the innovative new head is unlike any on a boat of its size, featuring a separate stall shower with space saving retractable commode, elegant vanity and spacious dressing room. We build each Intrepid to order so tell us what works for you, and we’ll craft your new 375 for just the boating experience you have in mind.

You can expect the same smoothness on the water that every Intrepid is known for. A smooth, dry ride and maximum deadrise are the result of our industry-leading transverse stepped hull design. Vacuum-bagged, infused, and hand laid knitted uni-and multi-directional fiberglass laminates, foam-cored hullsides, transoms, boat deck liners and wood free construction provide unprecedented strength, rigidity and safety without the performance-robbing weight.

Manufacturers Description

A proven tournament winner, the Contender 31 Open is a
brawny, top-quality fisherman whose meticulous finish and
high-performance capabilities placed her in the forefront of large
center console fishing machines. The high-tech hull is vacuum
bagged and cored above the waterline with wide reverse chines
and two lifting strakes per side to provide a dry ride. A single level
cockpit makes the Contender an easier boat to move around
than those center consoles with larger consoles. Features include
an integrated dive platform with ladder, two 40-gallon livewells,
transom door, deluxe leaning post with rod holders and tackle
center, in-deck fish boxes (two fully lined 400-qt. boxes forward,
two 225-qt. boxes aft), recessed bow rails, raw-water washdown,
gunnel rod holders, cockpit rod storage, recessed trim tabs, walk-in
console with marine head, cockpit bolsters and an anchor locker.
Note optional fuel capacity to 400 gallons. A fast ride in
the most challenging conditions, the Contender 31 will reach over
45 knots top with twin 250hp Yamaha outboards.

Description

The 2007 52 Viking Sport Tower has many upgrades and features. She is the only 52 Viking on the market with a gyro Sea Keeper 9, which was added in 2018 by Tri Seas Stabilizers. She is powered by MAN 1550 HP Common Rail engines and will easily cruise at 32-33 knots.

Vessel Accommodations

GeneralBoatDescription:
This boat is professionally maintained and looked after by a full time captain.  Service records for all recent service including flywheels available.  Owner takes incredibly good care of this boat.

The 430 Sport Yacht combines outboard power and Intrepid's unique hull design to accommodate the needs and desires of serious fishermen, as well as pleasure boating passengers. A luxurious sense of space meets unmatched performance rarely found in boats of this size.

The helm boasts commanding views and a pop-up console with the latest flat-screen electronics. An optional power sunroof overlooks wraparound club-style seating that facilitates comfortable interaction between skipper and crew. Additional features include custom hull color, underwater lighting, icemaker, audio-video systems, air-conditioning, power helm seating, and anchor windlass with washdown spigot. During the day, the cabin floods with natural sunlight, and the amenities are so complete that a couple could blissfully hit the islands for a week aboard this boat. And the 430 Sport Yacht serves equally as well as a racy, big water dayboat for short hops, entertaining, or a casual day on the bay. This is pure boating pleasure from the smooth, powerful ride to its state-of-the-art accommodations, the 430 Sport Yacht blends luxurious space, well thought out efficiency and peace of mind to create the best boat-owning experience on the water. Only Intrepid could give you a sport yacht that does so much so well.



2016 Intrepid 430 Sport Yacht Dark Blue Hullside with White Boot Stripe.

Triple 350 Yamaha engines with 700 hours, engines painted White with fresh flywheel service.

Fiberglass Top, Side Door Swing in, Bow Thruster AC in Cabin and at Helm, Engine Flush System, Underwater Lights, Bottom Paint, All New 2x Garmin GPS/Plotter/Sounder, Digital Depth, Autopilot, VHF, Horn, Satellite TV, Fusion Stereo. with JL Audio Speakers.

Recent 100 Hour Service COMPLETED PLUS NEW FLYWHEELS!

PBG description
Any top-tier quality ranking of U.S. boat builders would certainly
include the Intrepid brand at or near the top of the list. Intrepids
are all about quality, and the 430 Sport Yacht—introduced in
2009—is a tour-de-force of American boat building excellence.
With her shapely lines and versatile deck layout, few boats can
match the 430’s aura of luxury and sophistication. Built on a
foam-cored, single-step hull with a slender 12'8" beam, the 430SY
combines outboard power and Intrepid’s unique hull design to
meet the needs of serious fishermen and cruising families alike.
The cockpit can be fitted with a wide range of factory bait stations,
livewells, and fish boxes, etc. A large L-shaped lounge seat to port
and removable bench seat aft provide comfortable seating for
several passengers, and the 430’s well-appointed cabin features
a separate aft cabin with queen bed in addition to a stand-up head
with stall shower, compact galley with microwave, and forward
settee seating that converts to a V-berth. Note the stylish hullside
windows, hardtop sunroof, and mirror-smooth gelcoat. Triple
Yamaha F350 outboards cruise the Intrepid 430SY at 30 knots
(high 40s top).

GeneralBoatDescription: Come see it today before its gone
AdditionalDetailDescription:
V37
V-37
Balanced Attack
Hitting the sweet spot in the V Series lineup, the V-37 shines as a versatile coastal or offshore fish-raising thoroughbred with the legs to run long distances powered by triple yamaha outboards.

Overview
Performance needs vary depending on region, fishing preferences, targeted species and other factors. With that in mind, we offer five different power choices: triple Mercury Verado 300s, 400s or 450Rs, triple Yamaha 300s or twin Yamaha 425s. Ease of operation and comfort aboard are high priorities. Each engine installation can be equipped with joystick helm control featuring GPS station-keeping. The V-37 has been designed and engineered for a Seakeeper SK 3, which is mounted in the stringer grid and accessed through a gasketed, tightly sealed deck hatch.

The V-37 can be outfitted with an aft mezzanine seating module with armrests, tackle storage and an insulated cooler (or optional live well) under the seat. And she's loaded with lockers, compartments and hardware that maximize storage while maintaining the boat's 360-degree accessibility. For instance, the standard lounge that's integrated into the forward console holds a cooler and dry storage, and the GG Schmitt transom seats can be flipped up and out of the way when it's time to fish.

2022 Scout 330 LXF
Why wait 18 months for a new Scout 330 costing over $600K. When you can Drive this practically new one, out Tomorrow!! With 17 months left of full warranty. Located in North Miami FL. Call for additional information or to schedule an easy "any day" appointment.

Twin Mercury 400 Verado's JPO (Joystick) with only 45 hours. Like new condition with a fresh detail. Barely used, never kept in the water overnight. Never fished, used as Real-estate touring boat on the ICW. Stored on a lift behind the owners house with a full boat cover, and Diamond Tech Ceramic Hull Coated inside and out!.

Full Hull Color Midnight Blue. Dual Garmin Display 8612 XVS. Transducer. Underwater Lights. Electric fiberglass sun shade. Cranking outriggers. 12V Air Conditioned Cabin Sleeps 2, Full head/shower/sink . Lumitec light Bar. Windshield Wiper. Bow rod/cup holder. Electric fwd dinette table.

The Scout 330 LXF is a luxurious and high-performance center console boat that is designed for both serious fishing and comfortable cruising. With a length of 33 feet and a beam of 10 feet, the 330 LXF offers plenty of space for both diving,fishing and entertaining.

The 330 LXF is powered by twin Mercury 400 Verado outboard engines, which provide plenty of power and speed for any adventure on the water. The boat's advanced hull design and wide beam make it incredibly stable and seaworthy, allowing it to handle even the roughest offshore conditions with ease.

The cockpit of the 330 LXF is designed with the serious angler in mind, with ample rod storage,livewell, and multiple large fish boxes. The boat's T-top provides plenty of shade and protection from the elements, while the comfortable seating and advanced electronics make it easy to spend long days on the water.

In addition to its fishing features, the 330 LXF also boasts luxurious amenities for comfortable cruising. The boat's cabin features a full head and galley, as well as comfortable sleeping accommodations for up to 2 people. The boat's large cockpit and bow areas are perfect for entertaining guests and enjoying the beautiful scenery.

Overall, the Scout 330 LXF is an exceptional choice for boaters who want a versatile and high-performance boat that can handle any adventure on the water, whether it's fishing, cruising, or simply enjoying a day on the water with friends and family. With its advanced features and luxurious amenities, the 330 LXF is sure to impress even the most discerning boating enthusiasts.

This 2022 Cobalt has been extremely well cared for and is in IMMACULATE condition! Single Mercury 300 with Only 13 HOURS!! Is up to date on it's service history!TRAILER INCLUDEDWindlass Anchor, swim platform, electric head, floor covering, ample storage, wireless phone charger, and so so much more!
 Classic luxury, with a modern twist!  Meet the all-new Cobalt R6 bowrider. Cobalt Boats have long been known for their luxury, performance, and style. That legacy continues with the newly released Cobalt R6. The Cobalt R6 can be customized for your boating style. With three engine options: sterndrive, outboard, and a forward-drive option for the water sports enthusiast in the family.

While the R6 is not a radical departure from Cobalt R Series boats in recent years, you will certainly appreciate the steps they? They've taken to make these boats even better for you.

Notable Features:Familiar body lines
More robust hull design (similar to the Cobalt A29)
Modern interior
Increased seating
10" dual-screen Garmin displays
Ergonomic helm, dash and stereo controls
JL Audio speaker system
Rockford Fosgate head unit, with Bluetooth
Easier head access
Better engine access
Slightly heavier dry weight
More solid ride
AdditionalDetailDescription:
EXTERIOR
Perfect for both salt water and year-round lake boating, the R6 Outboard can tip its engine completely out of the water, making cooling-system drainage and maintenance simpler. Plus, we?ve combined the convenience, economy, and agility you expect with timeless Cobalt design for a striking presence and standout ride.

BOW STORAGE
Bow storage secures and organizes life vests, anchors or other equipment.

STAINLESS STEEL WINDSHIELD TRIM
Find a polished stainless steel top surface cap to windshield frames and enjoy the brightwork look the windshield possesses—all crafted to reflect heat in the sun and be cooler to the touch.

SPORT TOWER WITH SUNSHADE
A ridged mounted tower with stretched canvas provides good shade coverage for the cockpit. Additional pull out aft sunshade for extra coverage to rear seating. Unique top available on outboard models only.

INTERIOR FEATURE
COBALT + GARMIN
The Cobalt Glass Cockpit System is the premier multi-display solution for total helm control. The Garmin interface is fully integrated with the most pivotal handling and safety information from your Cobalt powertrain. The result is the ultimate boating experience now available with larger screens on select Cobalt models.

EXTERIOR INNOVATION
ARCH WITH ROTATING SUNSHADE
No need to take down your sunshade with the Arch with Rotating Sunshade. Built on our aluminum folding arch, the canvas remains up when the arch is folded down to lower positions, and the sunshade has a rigid frame for tight canvas fit and articulates as the arch is folded down, remaining flat. Gas assist cylinder or full electric actuation options make it easily operable for one person.

INTERIOR INNOVATION
FRESCO CHIL VINYL
Finally, no more hot seats on darker colored vinyl while you're out enjoying a full day of fun on the water. This anti-bacterial, anti-fungal, mildew-resistant, and sulfide stain-resistant fabric technology keeps your vinyl a full 15-20 degrees cooler than traditional vinyl even when it's out in the sun.

FEATURE
FENDER CLIP PACKAGE
The Cobalt stainless-steel fender clips are a quick mount system installed in the deck at the perfect fender position, so the lines are always set to optimum length. When docking, simply insert the pin into the fitting and you're done.

STEP & PLATFORM INNOVATION
SOF-TRAC POSITIVE TRACTION MAT
Dress up your swim platform with the Sof-Trac Positive Traction
Mat. Gentle on swimsuits and wakeboards, you'll maintain traction even when wet. Dealer-installed kits are available for most current models with or without the Swim Step.

INTERIOR
The R6 Outboard delivers excitement and elegance with wraparound yacht-style seating for comfort and luxury with plenty of room for gear, and increased space and capacity for a head compartment while still maintaining its sporty performance and responsive handling.

Interior
HEAD COMPARTMENT
Find a compartment with a deep step-down space, a tinted skylight, and a standard Porta Potti with options that include electric porcelain toilets, pump-out Porta Potti, and sink console.

LED ACCENT LIGHTING
Create a rich nighttime ambiance in the cockpit and bow areas with indirect lighting hidden in interior upholstery side panels that feature RGB selectable color and LED low-power consumption.

AFT BACKREST
Adjustable to 2 positions—face forward or face aft on either side of center walk-thru. Stainless-steel handles add security in rough waters all supported by a heavy-duty steel hinge mechanism.

Manufacturer Provided Description

Designed by the talented hands of Nuvolari and Lenard, the Gran Turismo 40 recreates the sport cruiser concept. A perfectly proportioned interior and superior performance make her not only eye catching but a pleasure to drive.

A giant step forward in the universe of sport-cruisers

Elegance, quality fittings, top-level finish and sensations guaranteed. The new Gran Turismo range developed by Beneteau is full of surprises. Harmonious throughout, many of the details on the new Gran Turismo 40 boat underline the balance between her strong sporting character and the type of functions you might expect for a pleasant, luxurious yet practical life on board.
In creating this boat, Beneteau sought out the well-known designers Nuvolari and Lenard who have already designed several legendary craft of this type. The builder has also made use of the latest innovations from his motor boats design office, applying all the technological resources available, with a view to offering outstanding comfort and sensations, as well as exceptional performance.

Accommodations

Ingeniously combining the protection afforded by a hard-top boat and the sensations of an open craft, the Gran Turismo 40 has a hard top which can be pushed right back. The electrically powered side glazing means that the ultra-spacious cockpit can be freed totally to accommodate up to twelve people. The conversion of the cockpit seating into immense sun-loungers increases still further the boat’s relaxation space, adding to the boat’s already generous 4m2 sunbaths with adjustable backrests up on the fore deck. No detail has been overlooked.

The galley is located in the cockpit or at the stern of the boat (aft galley pack) according to preference. In this layout, the saloon has an additional seat.

In a marriage of speed and style, the new Gran Turismo 40 is as pleasant to admire as she is to drive. Designed to stand out on the water, her lines are elegant accentuated by a streamlined hull and the hard-top with its carefully designed side glazing. Enhancing both visibility and comfort, Beneteau has centred the three-
seater helming station. With the latest generation Air Step planing hull, this new

Sport Cruiser gives you driving sensations and a level of comfort whereby you can sail safely and comfortably at speeds of up to 35 knots. The Volvo Z Drive engine makes this new motor boat particularly manoeuvrable.

For a wonderful entry to nautical and aquatic experiences, the vast swim platform, (1.30m deep) with motorization as an optional extra, can be lowered to just below sea level. Linking life on board and the sea, it offers features you find on great yachts. It is particularly useful for stowing the tender when sailing.

The layout of the lower deck provides a feeling of space which has never been seen before on a boat of this size. Facing the spacious convertible saloon with large hull windows, a proper fully-fitted kitchen galley complements the deck kitchen. With her two cabins, and a real washroom with separate shower, the GranTurismo 40 clearly stands out for her habitability.

Everything about the new Gran Turismo range invites you to explore every detail of what makes these boats different. We look forward to seeing you at the boat shows in the winter.

Manufacturer Provided Description

The Formula 500 Super Sport Crossover is your best choice for taking a time out on the water. Finally, a fifty-foot answer to your private escape with family and friends, combining a commanding offshore ride with unprecedented amenities and luxury. The 500 SSC offers the Formula Crossover heritage of a wide-open, single-level bowrider inviting open station-to-station wandering.

From the enclosed coupe-top salon to the aft lounge bar, the 500 SSC is a true evolution and culmination of the Formula SmartZone? concept. From the full bow lounge forward to the expansive extended swim platform aft, you will find air-conditioned comfort, entertainment and innovation. A full-width motorized glass salon bulkhead allows you to choose your degree of separation or shared fun with the aft cockpit lounges and bar areas.

The 500 SSC amenities below offer a respite from the outside world with a true cabin experience. A complete galley at the cabin entry stairs, the large convertible U-lounge forward, a head with Corian surfacing, vanity sink and spacious shower create a residential feel. Slip aft to the separate stateroom with queen-size berth, sofa and complete entertainment suite.

The proven,  surefooted double-step FAS3Tech® hull will take your complement of guests to dinner across the bay or on far-flung offshore journeys in speed and comfort with the confidence and might of the revolutionary all-new quad Mercury V12, 600 horsepower Verado outboards. The horizons are limitless in your 500 Super Sport Crossover.

GeneralBoatDescription:
The Sea Ray 260 Sundeck might easily be
confused with a full-blown sportboat were it not for her broad bow
area with its lounge seating and walk-through boarding gate.

The passenger-side console houses a lockable head with sink and opening port, and a well-positioned

cockpit galley—or wetbar—includes a second sink as well as an
insulated cooler and faucet with pullout sprayer. An L-shaped
settee spans the transom and port side of the cockpit, and the rear
section rises to reveal the engine compartment. An extended swim
platform was standard and docking lights were a popular option.
Technically, a permit is required to tow the Sea Ray 270 since her
8'10" beam slightly exceeds the legal 8'6" width restriction. Among
several engine options, a single 375hp MerCruiser I/O will reach a
top speed of just over 40 knots.
